panels.title: About This Tab
panels.content: 💰 Reference table of the most profitable trading routes. Silver/day figures assume you fill your cart with the listed goods. Price fluctuations (up/down arrows in game) can shift these values — scout ahead to confirm.

panels.title: Most Profitable Routes
rows: 5× Mussels to Lune (+1,000). 3× Chickens back to Beorein (+1,200). Requires Livestock ★★ and Chicken Product rumor.

panels.title: Optimal Grinding Route (to 9,999,999 silver)
rows: Buy Tuxedo ×1, Sweater ×2, Silk Hat ×2, Muffler ×2
Sell Beorein goods. Buy expensive spices.
Sell Diemoln goods. Buy expensive fabrics.
Sell Lenos goods. Buy gold or coffee (whichever is more expensive).
Sell everything. Buy Cinnamon ×2. Turn around and head back to Beorein.
Buy the most expensive available goods.
Sell Cinnamon. Buy gold or coffee.
Sell Ruvinheigen goods. Buy expensive fabrics.
Sell Lamtra goods. Buy expensive spices.
